limitations: Raw sim_rcs absolute magnitude is not validated as physical truth for these canonical meshes.
No radome, ground multipath, pose articulation, or material-layer model.
Use for fast design estimates before measured or ray-traced assets are connected.
notes: Rider plus coarse bicycle frame/wheel approximation.

rcsUsagePolicy.futureUpgrade: Replace nominalRcsDbsm with measured RCS tables or validated ray-traced RCS distributions.
rcsUsagePolicy.recommended: Use RadarSim sim_rcs for aspect-angle response shape, then normalize to nominalRcsDbsm until measured or validated CAD/material data is available.
